title: Star Wars: Episode IV - A New Hope
synopsis: Luke Skywalker joins Princess Leia, Han Solo, Obi-Wan Kenobi, and the Rebel Alliance in a mission to destroy the Empire's planet-killing battle station.

title: Dune: Part Two
synopsis: Paul Atreides unites with Chani and the Fremen while seeking revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family.

title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring
synopsis: A young hobbit begins a dangerous journey to destroy the One Ring before the Dark Lord Sauron can reclaim it.

title: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone
synopsis: Harry Potter discovers he is a wizard and begins his first year at Hogwarts, where he learns about friendship, magic, and his past.

title: The Dark Knight
synopsis: Batman faces the Joker, a criminal mastermind who pushes Gotham City and its heroes into chaos.

title: Inception
synopsis: A skilled thief enters dreams to steal secrets and is offered a chance to erase his past through one final impossible job.

title: Spider-Man: No Way Home
synopsis: Peter Parker asks Doctor Strange for help after his identity is revealed, opening the door to visitors from other worlds.

title: Avatar: The Way of Water
synopsis: Jake Sully and Neytiri protect their family while discovering the ocean clans of Pandora.

title: Inside Out 2
synopsis: Riley becomes a teenager as new emotions arrive and reshape the way her mind handles change.

title: Oppenheimer
synopsis: J. Robert Oppenheimer leads the Manhattan Project and faces the consequences of creating the atomic bomb.
